goal: 持续推进 cxs 多源 retrieval engine：Claude Code source 控制面、reconciliation、review、验证、发布安装态收口

summary.title: 集成 Claude Code 私有 source adapter
summary.what: 在 cxs source-aware foundation 上集成 private/non-public claude-code source adapter、selector/source mismatch guard、synthetic privacy tests、当前态 docs、distributable cxs skill source，以及 2026-06-06 Claude Code source workflow 的 handoff/verification 控制面。
summary.why: 用户目标是把 cxs 从 Codex-only 检索推进到多源 retrieval engine，并让 Claude Code support 走 adapter、验证、文档、skill、发布和安装态的完整收口。本次 L1 先把已经通过 C1/R2/V1/D1/S1 证据的源码层和 skill source 层整合提交，但不越界声称发布或安装完成。
summary.user_goal: 持续推进 cxs 多源 retrieval engine：Claude Code source 控制面、reconciliation、review、验证、发布安装态收口

decisions.point: Claude Code source 暴露边界
decisions.chose: 注册 claude-code 为 private/non-public adapter，public CLI 仍只接受 codex。
decisions.rationale: V1 和 L1 smokes 均证明 public --source claude-code 与 selector source claude-code 返回 unsupported_source；这样能验证内部 adapter path，同时避免把 raw Claude JSONL 或安装态误导成 public promise。
rejected: 直接把 claude-code 作为 public CLI source 发布
把 raw Claude transcript path 当成普通用户检索入口

decisions.point: 隐私与 skipped record 处理
decisions.chose: parser 和 inventory 共用 allowlist policy，仅 accepted user/assistant text records 能影响 identity、cwd、timestamps、fingerprint、coverage input 和 projections。
decisions.rationale: W1B 的 P1 风险指出 skipped/meta/sidechain/tool-only records 不应影响元数据或可读内容；focused tests 和 private synthetic smoke 已覆盖这些 sentinel 不泄漏。
rejected: 沿用 1a080b1 中先读 metadata 再 skip 的做法
把 tool_use/tool_result 或 meta/sidechain 记录写入 searchable/read projections

decisions.chose: 只提交源码层、docs 层和 skill source 层；completion audit 明确 release、installed PATH CLI、global skill update 仍未完成。
decisions.rationale: 项目规则要求区分 checkout source、skill source、npm registry CLI、local PATH CLI，不能用本地 dirty tree 或未发布 checkout 冒充已发布/已安装状态。
rejected: npm publish 或更新全局 skill
声称本地 PATH cxs 已包含本次改动

decisions.chose: 保留 C1/R2/V1/D1/S1 handoffs 并在 L1 组合后重新跑 npm run check、CLI help/readback、unsupported-source smokes、npx skills ls 和 diff checks。
decisions.rationale: 组合提交需要证明集成后的 checkout 仍满足行为、文档和 skill source contract，而不是只依赖 worker 局部验证。
rejected: 只引用 worker 验证而不重新验证组合写集

rejected.alternative: 直接发布或安装本地 checkout
rejected.reason: P1/I1 gate 尚未执行，缺 registry/GitHub Actions/PATH smoke 证据。

rejected.alternative: 公开 raw Claude JSONL source contract
rejected.reason: 当前只证明 synthetic private adapter path，raw Claude format 仍不是稳定 public decision。

acknowledged_constraints.note: public CLI source 仍只有 codex；claude-code 在 public CLI 返回 unsupported_source。
tests/smokes 只使用 synthetic JSONL；没有提交真实 Claude transcript 内容。
docs、skill source 和 completion audit 明确 registry、PATH CLI、global skill 未更新。

review_notes: R2 independent review found no unresolved P1 and recommended V1.
V1 passed npm run check, public CLI rejection, Codex synthetic smoke, private Claude synthetic smoke, timeout grep, and final status on C1 commit.
S1 passed skill source diff, npx skills ls -g --json, CLI help/readback, unsupported-source smoke, and git diff --check; it did not update global skill.

L1 combination verification passed npm run check (28 files / 178 tests), npm run cxs -- --help, status --help, status --source claude-code --json exit 1, selector sync source claude-code exit 1, focused source tests, npx skills ls -g --json, and diff checks.
A parallel focused subset run once timed out in src/cli.test.ts at 5s, but the exact test passed alone in 2.62s and full npm run check passed.

architectural_claims: Session sources remain first-class; claude-code is registered internally as a private adapter while public CLI source exposure remains codex-only.
Claude Code inventory and parsing derive identity/freshness/projections only from accepted synthetic user/assistant text records.
behavioral_changes: syncSessions rejects selector.source mismatch before private source snapshot/sync/coverage/prune can proceed.
Programmatic private claude-code adapter can sync/read synthetic fixture data without leaking into default codex queries.
Public CLI rejects claude-code source with unsupported_source.

api_changes.signature: --source claude-code remains unsupported on public CLI

data_model_changes.name: private source_id claude-code rows through existing source-aware schema
data_model_changes.location: SQLite sessions/messages/coverage via existing source-aware tables
data_model_changes.migration_notes: No schema migration added; uses existing source-aware identity columns.

security_implications: Real Claude transcript content remains out of committed fixtures and workflow artifacts.
Skipped/meta/sidechain/tool-only records cannot set searchable text, read projections, source grouping, fingerprints, or coverage freshness.
migration_notes: No package version bump, npm release, installed PATH CLI update, or global skill update occurred in this seal.
Public promotion, registry release, and installed smoke remain P1/I1 follow-up gates.
